zh-HK: 平台預設產品資料更新至 2026-07-10-001，使用 July 2026 product template 並支援 unitPrice 空白時 fallback price_N2 / price_G
新增平台預設 stock.default.js（13,722 筆 stock metadata），未上載 stock Excel 時自動提供 Section / Family / Category / Sub-Category / Brand 配對
stock Excel 上載與 auto-load 會持久化完整 stockData；auto-load 會用檔名、修改時間、大小判斷未更新檔案並直接復用已保存資料
重置為平台預設會同時清除用戶產品 CSV 與 stock Excel cache，並重新套用平台 products.default.js / stock.default.js
產品與 stock default loader 改用 jsDelivr @main 加同源 fallback，移除 GitHub raw script fallback，避免 text/plain MIME 被瀏覽器拒絕執行
Similar Product Quick Add 會利用 stock/category manager 的 brand/category metadata 補充同品牌／同類型候選；metadata-only 命中不會預設勾選
en: Platform default products are updated to 2026-07-10-001 using the July 2026 product template with unitPrice fallback to price_N2 / price_G
Added platform default stock.default.js with 13,722 stock metadata rows so Section / Family / Category / Sub-Category / Brand mappings are available before user stock uploads
Stock Excel uploads and auto-load now persist full stockData; auto-load reuses saved data when filename, modified time, and size are unchanged
Reset to platform default now clears both uploaded product CSV and stock Excel cache, then reapplies platform products.default.js / stock.default.js
Product and stock default loaders now use jsDelivr @main with same-origin fallback, removing GitHub raw script fallback to avoid text/plain MIME execution failures
Similar Product Quick Add now uses stock/category manager brand/category metadata to include same-brand/category candidates; metadata-only matches are not preselected
